Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Ahh... Got my sandals on, givin' my feet a chance to breathe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Darn. There's nothing out there I can use as a marker. Too bad. I was hoping for a good swim.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Dude! Swim briefs? Nobody wants to see your junk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You gotta be kidding me. We come all the way to the beach and you're gonna train?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}What's wrong with that? You got a better idea?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Damn right, I do! It's summertime at the beach! I've got the perfect activity![n]{f 1 1}
